query.value:
select t.codeid, a.date
   from cd_ods.tb_at_whsal_master_t as t
       ,(
        select to_char(now() - generate_series(0,3749) *interval '1 days','yyyy-mm-dd') as  date
       ) a
where  a.date >= to_char(now() - INTERVAL '1 day', 'YYYY-MM-DD')   
order by a.date

select t.codeid, a.date
   from cd_ods.tb_at_whsal_master_t as t
       ,(
        select to_char(now() - generate_series(1,3750) *interval '1 days','yyyymmdd') as  date
       ) a
where  a.date between '20181001' AND '20181231'   
order by a.date;

SELECT
demandyear , dcsno , orntcode 
FROM 
(
SELECT COALESCE (b.dcsno, 'xxxxx') AS b_dcsno 
     , a.dcsno AS dcsno
     , a.orntcode  AS orntcode
     , a.demandyear  AS demandyear
FROM cd_ods.tb_d2b_cmpt_bid_notice_list a
  LEFT OUTER join   cd_ods.tb_d2b_bid_item_detail b
on a.dcsno  = b.dcsno
  AND a.demandyear = b.demandyear
  AND a.orntcode = b.orntcode
) a
WHERE a.b_dcsno = 'xxxxx'
;

SELECT demandyear , dcsno , orntcode ,  pblancNo, pblancOdr
FROM 
(
SELECT COALESCE (b.dcsno, 'xxxxx') AS b_dcsno 
     , a.dcsno AS dcsno
     , a.orntcode  AS orntcode
     , a.pblancno AS pblancno
     , a.pblancOdr AS pblancOdr
     , a.demandyear  AS demandyear
FROM cd_ods.tb_d2b_cmpt_bid_notice_list a
  LEFT OUTER join   cd_ods.tb_d2b_cmpt_bid_notice_detail b
on a.dcsno  = b.dcsno
  AND a.pblancno = b.pblancno
  AND a.pblancOdr = b.pblancOdr
  AND a.pblancdate  = b.pblancdate 
) a
WHERE a.b_dcsno = 'xxxxx'

SELECT 
distinct demandyear , dcsno , orntcode ,  pblancNo, pblancOdr,pblancdate 
FROM cd_ods.tb_d2b_cmpt_bid_notice_list
WHERE to_char(if_date, 'YYYYMMDD') = to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD');

truncate table cd_ods.tb_d2b_cmpt_bid_notice_detail_raw;

select 1 as success

INSERT INTO cd_ods.tb_d2b_cmpt_bid_notice_detail (
    pblancse,
    pblancno,
    pblancodr,
    pblancdate,
    pblictinstt,
    bidnm,
    excutty,
    dcsno,
    ornt,
    bidstle,
    cntrctmth,
    bidmth,
    cntrctknd,
    sucbidrdecsnmth,
    budgetamount,
    bidpartcptregistclosdt,
    biddocpresentnclosdt,
    opengdt,
    bidplace,
    bsnsdcmeetngdt,
    bsnsdcmeetngplace,
    registjdgmnpnttm,
    bsisprdprcapplcat,
    g2bpblancno,
    g2bpblancodr,
    copertnoutsrcflflmthd,
    compnoentrpsrsrchtrgetat,
    orgnlbudgtdedt,
    ntndbtdedt,
    chargernm,
    chargercttpc
)
SELECT
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'item' ->> 'pblancSe'                         as pblancse,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'item' ->> 'pblancNo'                         as pblancno,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'item' ->> 'pblancOdr'                        as pblancodr,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'item' ->> 'pblancDate'                       as pblancdate,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'item' ->> 'pblictInstt'                      as pblictinstt,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'item' ->> 'bidNm'                            as bidnm,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'item' ->> 'excutTy'                          as excutty,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'item' ->> 'dcsNo'                            as dcsno,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'item' ->> 'ornt'                             as ornt,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'item' ->> 'bidStle'                          as bidstle,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'item' ->> 'cntrctMth'                        as cntrctmth,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'item' ->> 'bidMth'                           as bidmth,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'item' ->> 'cntrctKnd'                        as cntrctknd,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'item' ->> 'sucbidrDecsnMth'                  as sucbidrdecsnmth,
    (t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'item' ->> 'budgetAmount')::numeric         as budgetamount,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'item' ->> 'bidPartcptRegistClosDt'           as bidpartcptregistclosdt,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'item' ->> 'biddocPresentnClosDt'             as biddocpresentnclosdt,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'item' ->> 'opengDt'                          as opengdt,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'item' ->> 'bidPlace'                         as bidplace,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'item' ->> 'bsnsDcMeetngDt'                   as bsnsdcmeetngdt,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'item' ->> 'bsnsDcMeetngPlace'                as bsnsdcmeetngplace,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'item' ->> 'registJdgmnPnttm'                 as registjdgmnpnttm,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'item' ->> 'bsisPrdprcApplcAt'                as bsisprdprcapplcat,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'item' ->> 'g2bPblancNo'                      as g2bpblancno,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'item' ->> 'g2bPblancOdr'                     as g2bpblancodr,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'item' ->> 'copertnOutsrcFlflMthd'            as copertnoutsrcflflmthd,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'item' ->> 'compnoEntrpsRsrchTrgetAt'         as compnoentrpsrsrchtrgetat,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'item' ->> 'orgnlbudgtDedt'                   as orgnlbudgtdedt,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'item' ->> 'ntndbtDedt'                       as ntndbtdedt,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'item' ->> 'chargerNm'                        as chargernm,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'item' ->> 'chargerCttpc'                     as chargercttpc
FROM cd_ods.tb_d2b_cmpt_bid_notice_detail_raw t;

select 1 as success

INSERT INTO cd_ods.tb_d2b_bid_item_detail (
   fsc
,niin
,unit
,apeqCode
,apeqName
,aprvDate
,bugtDivs
,codeVld1
,codeVld2
,codeVld3
,codeVld4
,dlvrDate
,dlvrPrrk
,dlvrQnty
,dlvrRegn
,dmstItnb
,itemName
,miltDivs
,ordrUtpr
,partNumb
,prcmRnum
,refcNumb
,specClas
,specNumb
,stnbTycd
,totlAmnt
)
SELECT
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'items' -> 'item' ->> 'fsc'                         as fsc,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'items' ->  'item' ->> 'niin'                         as niin,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'items' ->  'item' ->> 'unit'                        as unit,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'items' ->  'item' ->> 'apeqCode'                       as apeqCode,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'items' ->  'item' ->> 'apeqName'                      as apeqName,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'items' ->  'item' ->> 'aprvDate'                            as aprvDate,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'items' ->  'item' ->> 'bugtDivs'                          as bugtDivs,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'items' ->  'item' ->> 'codeVld1'                            as codeVld1,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'items' ->  'item' ->> 'codeVld2'                             as codeVld2,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'items' ->  'item' ->> 'codeVld3'                          as codeVld3,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'items' ->  'item' ->> 'codeVld4'                        as codeVld4,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'items' ->  'item' ->> 'dlvrDate'                           as dlvrDate,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'items' ->  'item' ->> 'dlvrPrrk'                        as dlvrPrrk,
    (t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'items' ->  'item' ->> 'dlvrQnty')::numeric         as dlvrQnty,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'items' ->  'item' ->> 'dlvrRegn'           as dlvrRegn,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'items' ->  'item' ->> 'dmstItnb'             as dmstItnb,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'items' ->  'item' ->> 'itemName'                          as itemName,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'items' ->  'item' ->> 'miltDivs'                         as miltDivs,
    (t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'items' ->  'item' ->> 'ordrUtpr')::numeric                    as ordrUtpr,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'items' ->  'item' ->> 'partNumb'                as partNumb,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'items' ->  'item' ->> 'prcmRnum'                 as prcmRnum,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'items' ->  'item' ->> 'refcNumb'                as refcNumb,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'items' ->  'item' ->> 'specClas'                      as specClas,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'items' ->  'item' ->> 'specNumb'                     as specNumb,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' ->  'items' -> 'item' ->> 'stnbTycd'            as stnbTycd,
    (t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'items' ->  'item' ->> 'totlAmnt')::numeric          as totlAmnt
FROM cd_ods.tb_d2b_bid_item_detail_raw_1 t;

select 1 as success

insert into cd_ods.tb_d2b_bid_item_detail
(
fsc
,niin
,unit
,apeqCode
,apeqName
,aprvDate
,bugtDivs
,codeVld1
,codeVld2
,codeVld3
,codeVld4
,dlvrDate
,dlvrPrrk
,dlvrQnty
,dlvrRegn
,dmstItnb
,itemName
,miltDivs
,ordrUtpr
,partNumb
,prcmRnum
,refcNumb
,specClas
,specNumb
,stnbTycd
,totlAmnt
)
SELECT 
    item ->> 'fsc'       AS fsc,
    item ->> 'niin'      AS niin,
    item ->> 'unit'      AS unit,
    item ->> 'apeqCode'  AS apeqCode,
    item ->> 'apeqName'  AS apeqName,
    item ->> 'aprvDate'  AS aprvDate,
    item ->> 'bugtDivs'  AS bugtDivs,
    item ->> 'codeVld1'  AS codeVld1,
    item ->> 'codeVld2'  AS codeVld2,
    item ->> 'codeVld3'  AS codeVld3,
    item ->> 'codeVld4'  AS codeVld4,
    item ->> 'dlvrDate'  AS dlvrDate,
    item ->> 'dlvrPrrk'  AS dlvrPrrk,
    (item ->> 'dlvrQnty')::numeric  AS dlvrQnty,
    item ->> 'dlvrRegn'  AS dlvrRegn,
    item ->> 'dmstItnb'  AS dmstItnb,
    item ->> 'itemName'  AS itemName,
    item ->> 'miltDivs'  AS miltDivs,
    (item ->> 'ordrUtpr')::numeric  AS ordrUtpr,
    item ->> 'partNumb'  AS partNumb,
    item ->> 'prcmRnum'  AS prcmRnum,
    item ->> 'refcNumb'  AS refcNumb,
    item ->> 'specClas'  AS specClas,
    item ->> 'specNumb'  AS specNumb,
    item ->> 'stnbTycd'  AS stnbTycd,
    (item ->> 'totlAmnt')::numeric  AS totlAmnt
FROM cd_ods.tb_d2b_bid_item_detail_raw_2 t
CROSS JOIN jsonb_array_elements(
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'items' -> 'item'
) AS item;

select 1 as success

query.value:
SELECT 
distinct demandyear , dcsno , orntcode ,  pblancNo, pblancOdr,pblancdate 
FROM cd_ods.tb_d2b_cmpt_bid_notice_list
WHERE to_char(if_date, 'YYYYMMDD') = to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD');

SELECT demandyear , dcsno , orntcode ,  iemno, opengdate
FROM 
(
SELECT COALESCE (b.dcsno, 'xxxxx') AS b_dcsno 
     , a.dcsno AS dcsno
     , a.orntcode  AS orntcode
     , a.demandyear  AS demandyear
     , a.iemno  AS iemno
     , a.opengdate  AS opengdate
FROM cd_ods.tb_d2b_competition_bid_result_list a
  LEFT OUTER join   cd_ods.tb_d2b_competition_bid_result_company_list b
on a.dcsno  = b.dcsno
  AND a.demandyear = b.demandyear
  AND a.iemno = b.iemno
  AND a.orntcode = b.orntcode
  WHERE a.opengdate BETWEEN  '20210101%' AND '20221231'
   AND a.bidresult != '유찰'
) a
WHERE a.b_dcsno = 'xxxxx'
;

SELECT
demandyear , dcsno , orntcode ,  iemno, opengdate, pblancno, pblancodr
FROM 
(
SELECT COALESCE (b.dcsno, 'xxxxx') AS b_dcsno 
     , a.dcsno AS dcsno
     , a.orntcode  AS orntcode
     , a.pblancno AS pblancno
     , a.pblancOdr AS pblancOdr
     , a.demandyear  AS demandyear
     , a.iemno  AS iemno
     , a.opengdate  AS opengdate
FROM cd_ods.tb_d2b_competition_bid_result_list a
  LEFT OUTER join   cd_ods.tb_d2b_competition_bid_result_detail b
on a.dcsno  = b.dcsno
  AND a.pblancno = b.pblancno
  AND a.pblancOdr = b.pblancOdr
WHERE a.opengdate LIKE '2021%'
) a
WHERE a.b_dcsno = 'xxxxx'

activities.name: get totalcount
activities.description: 대표 제품의 생성 기간동안 토탈 건수

query.value:
SELECT
demandyear , dcsno , orntcode ,  iemno, opengdate, pblancno, pblancodr
FROM 
(
SELECT COALESCE (b.dcsno, 'xxxxx') AS b_dcsno 
     , a.dcsno AS dcsno
     , a.orntcode  AS orntcode
     , a.pblancno AS pblancno
     , a.pblancOdr AS pblancOdr
     , a.demandyear  AS demandyear
     , a.iemno  AS iemno
     , a.opengdate  AS opengdate
FROM cd_ods.tb_d2b_competition_bid_result_list a
  LEFT OUTER join   cd_ods.tb_d2b_competition_bid_result_detail b
on a.dcsno  = b.dcsno
  AND a.pblancno = b.pblancno
  AND a.pblancOdr = b.pblancOdr
) a
WHERE a.b_dcsno = 'xxxxx'

SELECT
demandyear , dcsno , orntcode ,  iemno, opengdate
FROM 
(
SELECT COALESCE (b.dcsno, 'xxxxx') AS b_dcsno 
     , a.dcsno AS dcsno
     , a.orntcode  AS orntcode
     , a.demandyear  AS demandyear
     , a.iemno  AS iemno
     , a.opengdate  AS opengdate
FROM cd_ods.tb_d2b_competition_bid_result_list a
  LEFT OUTER join   cd_ods.tb_d2b_competition_bid_result_company_list b
on a.dcsno  = b.dcsno
  AND a.demandyear = b.demandyear
  AND a.iemno = b.iemno
  AND a.orntcode = b.orntcode
  WHERE to_Char(a.if_date, 'YYYYMMDD') = to_Char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') 
   and a.bidresult != '유찰'
) a
WHERE a.b_dcsno = 'xxxxx'
;

truncate table cd_ods.tb_d2b_competition_bid_result_detail_raw;

select 1 as success

INSERT INTO cd_ods.tb_d2b_competition_bid_result_detail (
ornt
,bidNm
,dcsNo
,bidMth
,excutty
,opengDt
,pblancNo
,pblancSe
,bidResult
,cntrctMth
,pblancOdr
,asessRtLwlt
,asessRtUplmt
,bsisPreparPc
,budgetAmount
,scsbidLwltRt
,scsbidEntrpsNm
,sucbidrDecsnMth
,scsbidEntrpsCode
,scsbidEntrpsBsnmRegistNo
)
SELECT
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'item' ->> 'ornt'                         as ornt,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body'  ->  'item' ->> 'bidNm'                         as bidNm,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body'  ->  'item' ->> 'dcsNo'                        as dcsNo,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body'  ->  'item' ->> 'bidMth'                       as bidMth,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body'  ->  'item' ->> 'excutTy'                      as excutTy,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body'  ->  'item' ->> 'opengDt'                            as opengDt,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body'  ->  'item' ->> 'pblancNo'                          as pblancNo,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' ->  'item' ->> 'pblancSe'                            as pblancSe,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body'  ->  'item' ->> 'bidResult'                             as bidResult,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body'  ->  'item' ->> 'cntrctMth'                          as cntrctMth,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body'  ->  'item' ->> 'pblancOdr'                        as pblancOdr,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body'  ->  'item' ->> 'asessRtLwlt'                           as asessRtLwlt,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body'  ->  'item' ->> 'asessRtUplmt'                        as asessRtUplmt,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body'  ->  'item' ->> 'bsisPreparPc'        as bsisPreparPc,
    (t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body'  ->  'item' ->> 'budgetAmount')::numeric          as budgetAmount,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body'  ->  'item' ->> 'scsbidLwltRt'             as scsbidLwltRt,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body'  ->  'item' ->> 'scsbidEntrpsNm'                          as scsbidEntrpsNm,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body'  ->  'item' ->> 'sucbidrDecsnMth'                         as sucbidrDecsnMth,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body'  ->  'item' ->> 'scsbidEntrpsCode'                   as scsbidEntrpsCode,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' ->   'item' ->> 'scsbidEntrpsBsnmRegistNo'                as scsbidEntrpsBsnmRegistNo
FROM cd_ods.tb_d2b_competition_bid_result_detail_raw t;

select 1 as success

INSERT INTO cd_ods.tb_d2b_competition_bid_result_company_list(
demandyear
,dcsno
,orntcode
,iemno
,opengdate
,gpsTime
,bidnQnty
,bidnRank
,bidnRate
,bidnRslt
,bidxDegr
,bidxNote
,bznsRgnb
,mfkrName
,middScor
,mnufCode
,pqcmDivs
,prceScor
,rptrKore
,tbidAmnt
,tbidLepr
,tbidQnty
,tbidUtpr
,totaScor
)
select
t.demandyear ,
t.dcsno ,
t.orntcode ,
t.iemno ,
t.opengdate,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' ->'items' ->  'item' ->> 'gpsTime'                         as gpsTime,
     (t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' ->'items'  ->  'item' ->> 'bidnQnty')::numeric                          as bidnQnty,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body'  ->'items' ->  'item' ->> 'bidnRank'                        as bidnRank,
     (t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' ->'items'  ->  'item' ->> 'bidnRate')::numeric                        as bidnRate,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body'  ->'items' ->  'item' ->> 'bidnRslt'                      as bidnRslt,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' ->'items'  ->  'item' ->> 'bidxDegr'                            as bidxDegr,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' ->'items'  ->  'item' ->> 'bidxNote'                          as bidxNote,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body'->'items'  ->  'item' ->> 'bznsRgnb'                            as bznsRgnb,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' ->'items'  ->  'item' ->> 'mfkrName'                             as mfkrName,
     (t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body'  ->'items' ->  'item' ->> 'middScor')::numeric                           as middScor,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' ->'items'  ->  'item' ->> 'mnufCode'                        as mnufCode,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' ->'items'  ->  'item' ->> 'pqcmDivs'                           as pqcmDivs,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' ->'items'  ->  'item' ->> 'prceScor'                        as prceScor,
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' ->'items'  ->  'item' ->> 'rptrKore'        as rptrKore,
    (t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' ->'items' ->  'item' ->> 'tbidAmnt')::numeric          as tbidAmnt,
    ( t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body'  ->'items' ->  'item' ->> 'tbidLepr')::numeric              as tbidLepr,
     (t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' ->'items'  ->  'item' ->> 'tbidQnty')::numeric                           as tbidQnty,
     (t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body'  ->'items' ->  'item' ->> 'tbidUtpr')::numeric                          as tbidUtpr,
     (t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' ->'items'  ->  'item' ->> 'totaScor')::numeric                    as totaScor
FROM cd_ods.tb_d2b_competition_bid_result_company_list_raw_1 t;
 
select 1 as success

insert into cd_ods.tb_d2b_competition_bid_result_company_list
(
demandyear
,dcsno
,orntcode
,iemno
,opengdate
,gpsTime
,bidnQnty
,bidnRank
,bidnRate
,bidnRslt
,bidxDegr
,bidxNote
,bznsRgnb
,mfkrName
,middScor
,mnufCode
,pqcmDivs
,prceScor
,rptrKore
,tbidAmnt
,tbidLepr
,tbidQnty
,tbidUtpr
,totaScor
)
SELECT 
t.demandyear ,
t.dcsno ,
t.orntcode ,
t.iemno ,
t.opengdate,
    item ->> 'gpsTime'       AS gpsTime,
    (item ->> 'bidnQnty')::numeric      AS bidnQnty,
    item ->> 'bidnRank'      AS bidnRank,
    (item ->> 'bidnRate')::numeric  AS bidnRate,
    item ->> 'bidnRslt'  AS bidnRslt,
    item ->> 'bidxDegr'  AS bidxDegr,
    item ->> 'bidxNote'  AS bidxNote,
    item ->> 'bznsRgnb'  AS bznsRgnb,
    item ->> 'mfkrName'  AS mfkrName,
    (item ->> 'middScor')::numeric  AS middScor,
    item ->> 'mnufCode'  AS mnufCode,
    item ->> 'pqcmDivs'  AS pqcmDivs,
    item ->> 'prceScor'  AS prceScor,
    item ->> 'rptrKore'  AS rptrKore,
    (item ->> 'tbidAmnt')::numeric  AS tbidAmnt,
    (item ->> 'tbidLepr')::numeric  AS tbidLepr,
    (item ->> 'tbidQnty')::numeric  AS tbidQnty,
    (item ->> 'tbidUtpr')::numeric  AS tbidUtpr,
    (item ->> 'totaScor')::numeric  AS totaScor
FROM cd_ods.tb_d2b_competition_bid_result_company_list_raw_2 t
CROSS JOIN jsonb_array_elements(
    t.jsondata::jsonb -> 'response' -> 'body' -> 'items' -> 'item'
) AS item;
 
select 1 as success

SELECT
  dt * 5000 - 4999 AS str_seq,
  dt * 5000  AS end_seq
FROM generate_series(
  21,
  24,  
  1
) AS dt;

SELECT
  to_char(dt::date , 'YYYYMMDD') AS strdt,
  to_char((dt + INTERVAL '3 months' - INTERVAL '1 day')::date, 'YYYYMMDD') AS enddt
FROM generate_series(
  '2021-01-01'::date,
  now()::date,  
  '3 months'::interval
) AS dt;

select cmonth2 as cmonth
   from cd_ods.aps_sdc_pw_mst
  where cmonth2 between '@{pipeline().parameters.smonth}' and '@{pipeline().parameters.emonth}'
   group by cmonth2 
   order by cmonth2

select  to_char(to_date('2021','yyyy') + interval '1 year' * a.inter,'yyyy')||'01010000' as strdt      
        ,to_char(to_date('2021','yyyy') + interval '1 year' * a.inter,'yyyy')||'12312359' as enddt     
   from (                                                                                              
 select                                                                                                
        generate_series(                                                                               
                         0,                                                                            
                         2, 1  ) as inter                                                             
                         ) a

select  to_char(to_date('2022','yyyy') + interval '1 year' * a.inter,'yyyy')||'01010000' as strdt      
        ,to_char(to_date('2022','yyyy') + interval '1 year' * a.inter,'yyyy')||'12312359' as enddt     
   from (                                                                                              
 select                                                                                                
        generate_series(                                                                               
                         0,                                                                            
                         1, 1  ) as inter                                                             
                         ) a

select  to_char(to_date('1980','yyyy') + interval '1 year' * a.inter,'yyyy')||'01010000' as strdt      
        ,to_char(to_date('1980','yyyy') + interval '1 year' * a.inter,'yyyy')||'12312359' as enddt     
   from (                                                                                              
 select                                                                                                
        generate_series(                                                                               
                         0,                                                                            
                         43, 1  ) as inter                                                             
                         ) a

query.value: select bizno from cd_ods.tb_mas_procurement_corporation_increase

select bizno from cd_ods.tb_mas_procurement_corporation_increase 
WHERE bizno IN (
SELECT DISTINCT bizno FROM  cd_ods.tb_mas_procurement_corporation_industry_info
WHERE indstryty_nm LIKE '%식품%'
)

select bizno from cd_ods.tb_mas_procurement_corporation_increase
WHERE mnfct_div_cd = '02'

select  to_char(to_date('2001','yyyy') + interval '1 year' * a.inter,'yyyy')||'01010000' as strdt      
        ,to_char(to_date('2001','yyyy') + interval '1 year' * a.inter,'yyyy')||'12312359' as enddt     
   from (                                                                                              
 select                                                                                                
        generate_series(                                                                               
                         0,                                                                            
                         22, 1  ) as inter                                                             
                         ) a

select bizno from cd_ods.tb_mas_procurement_corporation_increase 
WHERE bizno IN (
SELECT DISTINCT bizno FROM  cd_ods.tb_mas_procurement_corporation_industry_info
WHERE indstryty_nm LIKE '%식품%'
)
